title: Chinese model Kimi K3 becomes the largest open-source AI model and surpasses Claude Fable 5 in tests
summary: Moonshot AI launches a 2.8 trillion parameter model that competes with the best closed models, marking a milestone in open AI.

title: Lenovo presents the world's first laptop with inkjet-printed OLED screen, the Legion R9000P
summary: The TCL CSOT panel offers 240 Hz and promises to make OLED technology cheaper in gaming laptops.

title: Google renames NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook and integrates it with its search app
summary: The AI-based research tool is now called Gemini Notebook and allows interactions with external applications.

title: AMD launches Ryzen 7 7700X3D as Newegg-exclusive CPU with bundle deals and favorable reviews
summary: The 8-core 3D V-Cache processor is sold in affordable bundles with motherboard and RAM, while reviews highlight its gaming performance.

title: EU orders Google to open Android to allow rival AI assistants and share search data
summary: The European Commission requires Google to grant competitors access to Android's microphone, camera, and screen, in an antitrust measure.

title: TSMC increases its investment in the US to $265 billion to manufacture 2 nm chips
summary: The Taiwanese manufacturer confirms the construction of four additional factories in Arizona, increasing its bet on US soil.

title: Leaks suggest Intel Nova Lake processors will be called Core Ultra 400 and will arrive in stages until 2027
summary: The new 52-core chips could take longer than expected, with a release date possibly in late 2027.

title: Linus Torvalds defends use of AI in Linux kernel and criticizes detractors
summary: The creator of Linux states that artificial intelligence is a useful tool and that the Linux project is not anti-machine.

title: Apple sues OpenAI for poaching employees and sends legal letters to dozens of ex-employees
summary: The Cupertino company accuses OpenAI of unfairly hiring former employees in possible violation of confidentiality agreements.

title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game creation tool in its mobile app
summary: The new AI Build feature allows users to generate scenes and objects using voice and text commands.

title: Google Search's AI mode now integrates with third-party apps and allows direct actions
summary: AI Mode can be linked with apps like Spotify and Maps to perform tasks from search, expanding its functionality.

title: LG accused of spying on users through silent updates and telemetry on its monitors
summary: An investigation by Gamers Nexus reveals that LG monitors install software without consent and send data to its servers.

title: GPD confirms Win Max 3 handheld console with 110W Strix Halo APU and 165 Hz OLED screen
summary: The new portable gaming device promises to be the most powerful on the market with RDNA 5 graphics and a high-frequency OLED screen.

title: SpaceX aborts launch of Starship V3 seconds after ignition
summary: The space company's rocket stopped due to a motor anomaly, postponing the mission indefinitely.

title: San Francisco mayor calls for stricter rules for Waymo robotaxis after road incident
summary: A traffic jam caused by an autonomous vehicle led the city to demand stricter oversight of these services.

title: Coca-Cola halts production of its Fairlife milk due to ransomware attack
summary: The dairy brand's plant was infected with ransomware, forcing operations to stop until the threat was contained.

title: Two members of Scattered Spider group sentenced to five and a half years for cyberattack on London Underground
summary: The hackers were sentenced for extorting London public transport and stealing £29 million.

title: CISA warns about zero-day vulnerability in SharePoint that is already being exploited
summary: The US cybersecurity agency added a critical remote code execution flaw to its catalog of actively exploited vulnerabilities.

title: Uber acquires Delivery Hero for $14.8 billion to expand in food delivery
summary: The purchase will nearly double Uber's global presence in the delivery sector, especially in markets outside North America.

title: Germany applies media law to artificial intelligence summaries like Google AI Overviews and Perplexity
summary: A state court ruled that AI systems processing news content must comply with German media regulation.
